text:
dataProperties(CoverageSummary, [
  "lines",
  "statements",
  "functions",
  "branches",
  "branchesTrue",
]);

return text
    .replace(RE_AMP, "&")
    .replace(RE_LT, "<")
    .replace(RE_GT, ">")
    .replace(RE_lt, "<")
    .replace(RE_gt, ">");

return `
${pct}% ${kind} ${covered}/${total}
`;
